title: ホープフルSの後に・新時代を2人で

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I'll run at my own pace... and I'll heed
the timing Trainer taught me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Now! Accelerate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This! This is it! This is how I run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Briiight! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright used to lament that she never
brought any glory to the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But today, she leaves a vivid footprint on their
legacy with this decisive G1 victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm back! Thank you for waiting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Good job out there, Bright. Aside from your start,
I mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're exactly right. Trainer, please forgive me. I
did poorly at the gate like always...
choice_data_list: Still, you made up for it.
Still, you made up for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That I did. Because you taught me when I should
start my final spurt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I can always hear your voice, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose after all the training we did with me
shouting out when to dash, she's come to hear my
voice unconsciously at the right time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we've proved that the style Mejiro Bright
and I have developed together can seize victory
even at the G1 level.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for letting me run in the Hopeful
Stakes. It's been quite a challenge...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yet the path ahead of me has opened wide. Just
as I expected.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? As you expected?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There is another race with the same conditions, a
2,000-meter G1 at Nakayama, next year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I may not be the most proactive, but since I was
able to run in this race, I believe I will have no
problems there either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A 2,000-meter race at Nakayama... The Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright, is your main goal what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is this your trainer's plan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I was very much aware that today
would be a good preliminary test. But it didn't
occur to me that Mejiro Bright was thinking along
those terms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be slow in strolling down her path, but
her eyes are fixed firmly on the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
All right, Dober, it's time for us to buckle down.
What lies ahead for you is the Triple Tiara. For
me, the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It'll be for the Mejiro family we both love and
adore, so let's do our best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We'll do it together! It's about time a Mejiro won
a Classics crown again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since Mejiro McQueen won the Kikuka Sho,
no Mejiro has won a G1 in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the promising winds of victory in the air,
Mejiro Bright shoulders the hopes of the Mejiro
family and sets her eyes on the Satsuki Sho.
